title: Business shop search, income controls, and dashboard fix
changes: Business shop now opens a search modal (type to filter, like /buy) instead of a static 25-item dropdown
New businesses with passive income configured now start with that amount already in their balance
Dashboard: added 'Grant Income' button per business — manually credits one income cycle without resetting the automatic cooldown timer
Fixed dashboard Economy page not rendering the Business Accounts list or Store Items section (broken forEach loop caused by a prior corrupted edit)
